notes: These are investor-friendly title companies in Phoenix/Maricopa County that handle assignment of contract and/or double close transactions. Verify assignment policy with each company before opening escrow.

companies.name: CLOSED Title
companies.address: Phoenix, AZ (verify current address at closedtitle.com)
companies.notes: Explicitly markets to real estate investors and wholesalers. Their website states they handle assignments, double closings, and specialize in fast, efficient closings for investors. First call to make.

companies.name: American Title Service Agency
companies.address: Phoenix, AZ metro (multiple locations including Arrowhead branch)
companies.notes: Local Arizona title agency. Appears in top investor-friendly title company lists for Phoenix. Has multiple branches. Ask specifically for their investor/wholesale department.

companies.name: DHI Title Agency
companies.notes: Active Phoenix title company. Appeared in Yelp top 10 for Phoenix title companies. Confirm assignment policy before opening escrow.

companies.name: First American Title — Phoenix (Matt Canady)
companies.phone: (verify — search 'First American Title Matt Canady Phoenix')
companies.notes: National title company with strong Phoenix presence. Large companies like First American handle assignments at their investor/commercial divisions. Ask specifically for investor services or commercial desk. Matt Canady mentioned in local listings.

companies.name: Clear Title Agency of Arizona
companies.notes: Local Arizona title agency. Appeared in Yelp top 10 for Phoenix title companies. Call and ask: 'Do you handle assignment of contract transactions for real estate investors?' They'll tell you quickly.

intro_email_template.subject: Investor-Friendly Title Services Needed — Phoenix AZ
intro_email_template.body:
Hi [NAME],

My name is Wolfgang Meyer. I'm a private real estate investor doing cash purchases and assignment of contract transactions in Maricopa County, Arizona.

I'm looking to establish a working relationship with a title company experienced in:
- Assignment of contract closings
- Double close transactions (when needed)
- Fast cash closings (7-14 day timelines)

I typically do 2-4 deals per month and need a reliable title partner who understands investor transactions. I'm not a licensed agent or broker — I'm a private buyer/investor operating under purchase contracts.

Would you or someone on your team be available for a quick 10-minute call this week to discuss whether we'd be a good fit?

Thank you for your time.

Wolfgang Meyer
Wolfgang Meyer Investments
[PHONE]
[EMAIL]

vetting_checklist: Ask: 'Do you handle assignment of contract closings?'
Ask: 'Are you comfortable with the assignment fee appearing on the HUD/settlement statement?'
Ask: 'Do you require the original seller to consent to the assignment?'
Ask: 'Can you do a double close if needed, using transactional funding?'
Ask: 'What's your typical timeline for cash closings?'
Ask: 'Do you have experience working with wholesale investors in Phoenix?'
